error.processing_error: An error occurred while processing the card.
error.reenter_transaction: The payment couldn't be processed by the issuer for an unknown reason.

error.revocation_of_all_authorizations: The card was declined for an unknown reason.
error.revocation_of_authorization: The card was declined for an unknown reason.

error.service_not_allowed: The card was declined for an unknown reason.

info.both:
Invite your friends to use the {{appName}} app and both receive {{rewardSender}} credit for your next ticket purchases.

You can redeem your bonus as soon as your friends have completed their first purchase.

Only applies to the referral of new customers (one invitation per registered user, independent from downloads and installed devices). Redeemable for order values of at least {{minimumPayment}}. A maximum of {{maxUsesPerLink}} invites per user.
info.sender:
Invite your friends to use the {{appName}} app and receive {{rewardSender}} credit for your next ticket purchase for every new customer you have referred.

You can redeem your bonus as soon as your friends have completed their first purchase.

Only applies to the referral of new customers (one invitation per registered user, independent from downloads and installed devices). Redeemable for order values of at least {{minimumPayment}}. A maximum of {{maxUsesPerLink}} invites per user.

description.default: Invite your friends to {{appName}}. For every successfully invited new customer you will both receive a credit of {{rewardSender}}.
description.different: Invite your friends to {{appName}}. For every successfully invited new customer you will receive a credit of {{rewardSender}}. And your friends get {{rewardReceiver}}.
description.senderonly: Invite your friends to {{appName}}. For every successfully invited new customer you will receive a credit of {{rewardSender}}.

invite.header: Receive a voucher for every referred friend!
invite.trackingdisabled: To invite friends you have to enable 'Personalized recommendations'.

landingpage.description: We are thrilled that you have accepted the invitation of {{createdBy}}! Tell us your e-mail address - your discount amounting to {{rewardReceiver}} will be deducted automatically at your first ticket purchase.

marketingMessages.description: We send timely information about discounts, seat availability, and relevant details when certain events are on sale.
marketingMessages.title: Event recommendations, alerts and special promotions
marketingMessages.trackingNote: To receive event recommendations, alerts and special promotions, usage data and personalized recommendations must be enabled.

newsletter.description: We send you information about premieres, expiring events, as well as special offers.
newsletter.title: Newsletter

operationalMessages.description: We send important information, such as order confirmations, that result directly from using the app.
operationalMessages.title: Required messages

push.description: If you deactivate push notifications, you will no longer receive any notifications about new events, expiring events, or special offers.
push.title: Push notifications

serviceMessages.description: We send notifications for last-minute performance changes and relevant information about events you've booked.
serviceMessages.title: Performance information and important notifications

text.email: We will send you a notification for short-term changes to performances, as well as relevant information about booked events.
text.newsletter: We will send you information on premieres and expiring events, as well as special offers and notifications for vacant seats at your favorite events.
text.push: You will receive notifications in time for the pre-sale start, for special offers and as a reminder for premieres and expiring events. This setting is unique to each of your devices.
text.tracking: Based on your usage behavior we recommend you relevant events and special promotions. All information can be found in our privacy policy.
